title: Resolve vacuum-current condition: SR3: latent exchange branch
description: Sector: latent exchange / curvature-from-warping. Allowed condition: exchange roles remain latent or diagnostic unless a real source law activates them without shifting M_A. Forbidden condition: latent exchange becomes a hidden mass current or boundary repair. Consequence: latent exchange may remain bookkeeping only if it has no source, metric, boundary, or mass effect..
